name: ui-space-shmup-board
description: SpaceShmupBoard — sci-fi SHMUP with TILE_CLICK/UNIT_CLICK input wiring, SHOOT HUD control, score/lives display, and UI Pack - Sci-fi assets.

schema.name: ui-space-shmup-board
schema.description: SpaceShmupBoard — sci-fi SHMUP with TILE_CLICK/UNIT_CLICK input wiring, SHOOT HUD control, score/lives display, and UI Pack - Sci-fi assets.

emits.description: Fires on tile click with grid coordinates
Fires on unit click with unit id
Player fires at an enemy unit
Fires when all enemies are destroyed or lives reach zero
Pause the game and show the pause menu
Resume play from the pause menu

events.name: Tile Click
events.description: Fires on tile click with grid coordinates

events.name: Unit Click
events.description: Fires on unit click with unit id

events.name: Shoot
events.description: Player fires at an enemy unit

events.name: Pause
events.description: Pause the game and show the pause menu

events.name: Game End
events.description: Fires when all enemies are destroyed or lives reach zero

events.name: Resume
events.description: Resume play from the pause menu

assetManifest.label: Asset Manifest
assetManifest.description: Sprite manifest for terrain, units, and effects

features.label: Features
features.description: Optional hazards or power-ups on the field

units.label: Units
units.description: Player ship (bottom centre) and 4 enemy ships across the top rows

frameCount.label: Frame count
frameCount.description: Number of sprite frames a unit cycles through before the animation loops.
